textByHash.9b5f3bfd29cc5b63e1d040fa06cc9e8b2ec4a81f: Who are you? Get out of here, I don't have anything for you.
textByHash.64fa9fc813b387736660f955fbf899e7d9dbf7c9: I don't know if I can trust you with any of my supplies...
textByHash.1d2980130ea82eaabc6a20c0d0cc5830ff6fa2c5: Welcome to the Magic Guild Store. Would you like to buy some magic supplies?
